title: May 28, 2026AnnouncementsAnthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation
summary: Announcements Anthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation May 28, 2026 Anthropic has raised $65 billion in Series H funding led by Altimeter Capital, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia Capital, valuing the company at $965 billion post-money. Global enterprises across industries are deploying Claude in their core operations, and a growing number of people around the world use it for their everyday work. Since our Series G in February, adoption has continued to grow across global enterprise customers, and our run-rate revenue crossed $47 billion earlier this month. This latest funding is expected to advance our safety and interpretability research, expand compute to meet growing demand for Claude, and scale the products and partnerships our customers rely on. “Claude is increasingly indispensable to our growing global community of customers, and we work tirelessly to make tools like Claude Code and Cowork more helpful, more powerful, and more adaptable to their needs,” said Krishna Rao, Chief Financial Officer of Anthropic. “This funding will help us serve the historic demand we are experiencing, stay at the research frontier, and bring Claude to more of the places where work happens.” The round was co-led by Capital Group, Coatue, D1 Capital Partners, GIC, ICONIQ, and XN. Significant investors in this round include AMP PBC, Baillie Gifford, Blackstone, Brookfield, D.E. Shaw Ventures, DST Global, Fidelity Management & Research Company, General Catalyst, Insight Partners, Jane Street, Lightspeed Venture Partners, MGX, NTTVC, NX1 Capital, Situational Awareness LP, T. Rowe Price Associates, Inc., T. Rowe Price Investment Management, Inc., and Temasek. It also includes $15 billion of previously committed investments from hyperscalers, including $5 billion from Amazon . Joining them are strategic infrastructure partners — Micron, Samsung, and SK hynix — whose technologies play a critical role in the world's supply of memory, storage, and logic ch
title_es: Anthropic recauda $65B en la ronda Serie H a valuación de $965B
bajada: Anthropic cerró su mayor ronda de financiamiento con $65 mil millones liderada por Altimeter, Dragoneer, Greenoaks y Sequoia, alcanzando una valuación de $965 mil millones. La compañía reporta ingresos anualizados de $47 mil millones y crecimiento acelerado de Claude en empresas globales.
bajada_en: Anthropic closed its largest funding round with $65 billion led by Altimeter, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia, reaching a $965 billion valuation. The company reports annualized revenue of $47 billion and accelerating Claude adoption across global enterprises.

title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8ProductMay 28, 2026An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consistency to handle long-running work.
summary: Product Announcements Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 May 28, 2026 We’re upgrading Claude Opus to a new version: Claude Opus 4.8. It builds on Opus 4.7 with improvements across benchmarks, and is a more effective collaborator. It’s available today for the same price. Opus 4.8 launches alongside several new features. Users on claude.ai now have control over the amount of effort Claude puts into a task. Claude Code has a new “dynamic workflows” feature that allows it to tackle very large-scale problems. And fast mode for Opus 4.8—where the model can work at 2.5× the speed—is now three times cheaper than it was for previous models. Opus 4.8’s capabilities The table below shows how Opus 4.8 compares to its predecessor and to other models on tests of coding, agentic skills, reasoning, and practical knowledge work tasks. More details and a much wider range of capability evaluations are provided in the Claude Opus 4.8 System Card . Collaborating with Opus 4.8 Early testers have found Claude Opus 4.8 to be more reliable and sharper in its judgement when it’s performing agentic tasks. Below are quotes from many of these testers about their experience collaborating with Opus 4.8: Claude Opus 4.8 has noticeably better judgment. In Claude Code, it asks the right questions, catches its own mistakes, pushes back when a plan isn’t sound, and builds up confidence around complex, multi-service explorations before making big changes. It’s a great model to build with. On our Super-Agent benchmark, Claude Opus 4.8 is the only model to complete every case end-to-end, beating prior Opus models and GPT-5.5 at parity on cost. For agent products in translation, deep research, slide-building, and analysis, it delivers powerful reliability. On CursorBench, Claude Opus 4.8 exceeds prior Opus models across every effort level. Tool calling is meaningfully more efficient, using fewer steps for the same intelligence, and it carries end-to-end tasks through. Claude Opus 4.8 delivers the highest score r
title_es: Claude Opus 4.8: mejor en código y tareas agénticas al mismo precio
bajada: Anthropic lanzó Claude Opus 4.8 con mejoras notables en coding, tareas agénticas y trabajo profesional, manteniendo el mismo precio. Incluye nuevas características como control de esfuerzo en claude.ai, dynamic workflows en Claude Code, y modo rápido 3x más barato.
bajada_en: Anthropic released Claude Opus 4.8 with notable improvements in coding, agentic tasks, and professional work at the same price. New features include effort control on claude.ai, dynamic workflows in Claude Code, and 3x cheaper fast mode.

title: anthropics /claude-code
summary: Claude Code Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows -- all through natural language commands. Use it in your terminal, IDE, or tag @claude on Github. Learn more in the official documentation . Get started Note Installation via npm is deprecated. Use one of the recommended methods below. For more installation options, uninstall steps, and troubleshooting, see the setup documentation . Install Claude Code: MacOS/Linux (Recommended): curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash Homebrew (MacOS/Linux): brew install --cask claude-code Windows (Recommended): irm https: // claude.ai / install.ps1 | iex WinGet (Windows): winget install Anthropic.ClaudeCode NPM (Deprecated): npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code Navigate to your project directory and run claude . Plugins This repository includes several Claude Code plugins that extend functionality with custom commands and agents. See the plugins directory for detailed documentation on available plugins. Reporting Bugs We welcome your feedback. Use the /bug command to report issues directly within Claude Code, or file a GitHub issue . Connect on Discord Join the Claude Developers Discord to connect with other developers using Claude Code. Get help, share feedback, and discuss your projects with the community. Data collection, usage, and retention When you use Claude Code, we collect feedback, which includes usage data (such as code acceptance or rejections), associated conversation data, and user feedback submitted via the /bug command. How we use your data See our data usage policies . Privacy safeguards We have implemented several safeguards to protect your data, including limited retention periods for sensitive information, restricted access to user session data, and clear policies against using feedback for model training. For full details, please review our
title_es: Claude Code disponible en terminal, IDE y GitHub
bajada: Anthropic lanzó Claude Code, herramienta agéntica que funciona en terminal e IDE, comprende tu base de código y ejecuta tareas rutinarias por comandos en lenguaje natural. Disponible vía curl, Homebrew y WinGet con documentación completa.
bajada_en: Anthropic launched Claude Code, an agentic tool for terminal and IDE that understands your codebase and executes routine tasks via natural language commands. Available via curl, Homebrew, and WinGet with full documentation.

title: Strengthening societal resilience with Rosalind Biodefense
summary: OpenAI launches Rosalind Biodefense, expanding trusted access to GPT-Rosalind for vetted developers and U.S. government partners advancing biodefense, public health, and pandemic preparedness through frontier AI.
title_es: OpenAI lanza Rosalind Biodefense para defensa biológica
bajada: OpenAI amplió el acceso a GPT-Rosalind para desarrolladores vetados y socios del gobierno estadounidense enfocados en defensa biológica, salud pública y preparación pandémica. La iniciativa permite que expertos utilicen IA de frontera de manera controlada para desafíos críticos de bioseguridad.
bajada_en: OpenAI expanded access to GPT-Rosalind for vetted developers and U.S. government partners focused on biodefense, public health, and pandemic preparedness. The initiative allows experts to use frontier AI in a controlled manner for critical biosecurity challenges.

title: Boston Children’s uses AI to unlock new diagnoses
summary: Boston Children’s Hospital uses OpenAI technology to improve patient care, reduce operational burden, and help diagnose more than 40 rare disease cases.
title_es: Boston Children's Hospital diagnostica 40+ casos raros con IA de OpenAI
bajada: Boston Children's Hospital utilizó tecnología de OpenAI para mejorar diagnósticos de enfermedades raras, identificando más de 40 nuevos casos y reduciendo la carga operativa del personal médico. Demuestra el impacto directo de IA en atención sanitaria.
bajada_en: Boston Children's Hospital used OpenAI technology to improve diagnosis of rare diseases, identifying over 40 new cases while reducing operational burden on medical staff. Demonstrates direct AI impact on healthcare delivery.

title: 9 demos of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5 in action
title_es: Google presenta demostraciones de Gemini Omni y Gemini 3.5
bajada: Google publicó 9 videos demostrando capacidades de Gemini Omni y Gemini 3.5 en escenarios reales. Los demos ilustran avances en multimodalidad y comprensión de contexto de los últimos modelos de Google.
bajada_en: Google released 9 videos demonstrating Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5 capabilities in real-world scenarios. The demos illustrate advances in multimodality and context understanding in Google's latest models.

title: Robinhood now lets your AI agents trade stocks
title_es: Robinhood permite que agentes IA ejecuten operaciones bursátiles
bajada: Robinhood integró capacidades de agentes IA para permitir que usuarios ejecuten operaciones automáticas en el mercado de valores. Marca un hito en la adopción de agentes autónomos para casos de uso financieros.
bajada_en: Robinhood integrated AI agent capabilities to allow users to execute automated stock trading operations. Marks a milestone in adoption of autonomous agents for financial use cases.

title: Coders are refusing to work without AI — and that could come back to bite them
summary: While AI is helping coders produce code faster, it may not be producing better code, researchers warn. And that could cause problems down the road for them.
title_es: Developers se niegan a trabajar sin IA, pero riesgos de calidad persisten
bajada: Investigadores advierten que aunque IA acelera producción de código, no necesariamente mejora su calidad. Coders cada vez más dependientes de herramientas IA pueden enfrentar problemas técnicos a largo plazo.
bajada_en: Researchers warn that while AI accelerates code production, it doesn't necessarily improve quality. Developers increasingly dependent on AI tools may face long-term technical problems.

title: After Nvidia’s $20B not-acqui-hire, AI chip startup Groq reportedly raising $650M
summary: Chipmaker Groq is looking to raise $650 million in internal funding as it pivots from hardware to focus more on AI inference, the process of refining the way AI models respond to prompted requests, per Axios.
title_es: Groq busca recaudar $650M tras maniobra fallida de Nvidia
bajada: Groq está buscando $650 millones en financiamiento interno después que Nvidia realizara un 'acqui-hire' de empleados sin adquirir la compañía. Groq pivotea enfoque de hardware a especialización en inferencia IA.
bajada_en: Groq seeks $650 million in internal funding after Nvidia's acqui-hire move. The chipmaker pivots from hardware focus to AI inference specialization.

title: How Braintrust turns customer requests into code with Codex
summary: How Braintrust engineers use Codex with GPT-5.5 to run experiments and code faster.
title_es: Braintrust acelera experimentos con Codex y GPT-5.5
bajada: Braintrust demuestra cómo sus ingenieros usan Codex con GPT-5.5 para acelerar experimentos y generación de código en producción. El caso de uso ilustra cómo las herramientas de OpenAI mejoran la velocidad de desarrollo.
bajada_en: Braintrust shows how its engineers use Codex with GPT-5.5 to accelerate experiments and code generation in production. The use case illustrates how OpenAI tools improve development velocity.

title: Liquid AI reveals 8B-A1B MoE trained on 38T
title_es: Liquid AI revela modelo MoE de 8B-A1B entrenado en 38T tokens
bajada: Liquid AI publicó detalles de su nuevo modelo de mezcla de expertos (MoE) con 8 mil millones de parámetros activados y 1 billón base, entrenado en 38 billones de tokens. Representa un avance en arquitecturas eficientes de modelos abiertos.
bajada_en: Liquid AI released details of its new Mixture of Experts (MoE) model with 8B active and 1B base parameters, trained on 38 trillion tokens. Represents a step forward in efficient open model architectures.

title: Show HN: Tiny-vLLM – high performance LLM inference engine in C++ and CUDA
title_es: Tiny-vLLM: motor de inferencia LLM en C++ y CUDA de alto rendimiento
bajada: Desarrollador presenta Tiny-vLLM, un motor de inferencia LLM optimizado escrito en C++ y CUDA para máximo rendimiento en inferencia local. Herramienta open-source dirigida a developers que necesitan ejecutar modelos eficientemente.
bajada_en: Developer released Tiny-vLLM, an optimized LLM inference engine written in C++ and CUDA for maximum local inference performance. Open-source tool for developers needing efficient model execution.

title: Hands-On With Gemini Spark: I Gave It Access to My Life and It Friend-Zoned My Boyfriend
summary: Google’s new AI agent combed through my emails, documents, and calendar to plan a birthday party and still didn’t clock the person most important to me.
title_es: Gemini Spark accede a tu vida digital pero falla en entender contexto personal
bajada: Análisis de Wired sobre Gemini Spark, agente de Google que accede a emails, documentos y calendarios. Aunque puede planificar eventos, el test revela limitaciones en entender contexto personal relevante.
bajada_en: Wired analysis of Gemini Spark, Google's agent with access to emails, documents, and calendars. While capable of event planning, the test reveals limitations in understanding relevant personal context.

title: Notes from the Mistral AI Now Summit
title_es: Resumen de la Cumbre Mistral AI Now 2026
bajada: Analista publica notas resumiendo anuncios y tendencias de la Cumbre Mistral AI Now. Proporciona contexto sobre roadmap y estrategia de Mistral para competir en mercado de LLMs.
bajada_en: Analyst publishes notes summarizing announcements and trends from Mistral AI Now Summit. Provides context on Mistral's roadmap and strategy to compete in LLM market.

title: Rsync 3.4.3 has hundreds of Claude commits
title_es: Rsync 3.4.3 recibió cientos de commits generados por Claude
bajada: Proyecto Rsync integró cientos de commits automáticamente generados por Claude para mejoras de código. Demuestra escalabilidad de agentes IA en mantenimiento de software open-source.
bajada_en: Rsync project integrated hundreds of commits automatically generated by Claude for code improvements. Demonstrates scalability of AI agents in open-source software maintenance.
